title: VersionHistory
description: Schema for a single version record stored in the Firestore subcollection: /{collection}/{docId}/versions/{versionId}. Every approved change to any operational document creates one of these records. Together they form a complete, immutable audit trail — the chain of custody for the document.

x-firestore.note: Version records are write-once. Once created they are never modified. Corrections require a new version on the parent document.

versionId.description: Unique ID of this version record. Maps to the Firestore document ID within the versions subcollection.

versionNumber.description: The version string at the time this record was created (e.g. '1.2.0'). Semantic versioning: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH.

previousVersionNumber.description: The version string this record supersedes. Null for the initial version (1.0.0).

previousVersionId.description: The versionId of the immediately prior record. Creates an explicit linked chain.

parentDocId.description: The Firestore document ID of the parent operational document.

parentCollection.description: The Firestore collection the parent document lives in.

changeType.description: Classification of what kind of change was made.

changeSummary.description: Human-readable summary of what changed in this version. Required. Must be specific enough to understand the change without reading the full diff.

changeReason.description: The justification or trigger for this change (e.g. 'OSHA citation 2024-03', 'Incident report #IR-441', 'Annual review cycle').

sectionsAffected.description: List of section names or step numbers that were modified.

changedBy.description: The person who authored this change. Chain of custody: who made the edit.

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID or internal user ID.

role.description: Job title or role at time of change.

changeDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this change was submitted. Server-side timestamp preferred.

status.description: The status of this version record.

approvalChain.description: The ordered sequence of approvers for this version. Each entry is appended when an approver acts. This is the authoritative chain of custody for this version.

comments.description: Optional notes from the approver. Required if action is Rejected or RequestedChanges.

delegatedTo.description: If action is Delegated, the userId of the person delegated to.

effectiveDate.description: The date this version became operationally effective. May differ from changeDate if a future effective date was set.

snapshotRef.description: Reference to a full document snapshot at this version (e.g. a Firestore path or Storage URL). Preserves the complete document state at this point in time.

diffRef.description: Optional reference to a structured diff artifact showing exactly what changed between this version and the previous one.

linkedIncidents.description: Any incident, audit finding, or corrective action that triggered or is associated with this change.
